title: Analytics - Find My Device Opened
scenario: Firebase analytics logs default elements when user opens Find My Device screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected mobile device.
Tap on the device name to access Device Settings.
Locate and tap on the 'Find My Device' option.
expected: The 'Find My Device' screen opens and displays the following default elements: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment. The event is tracked via Firebase analytics.
